name: cloudshops-mcp-analytics
description: MCP server exposing the Cloudshops analytics DB to LLM clients via the backend query gateway. Friendly business names + 5 tools: describe_schema, run_sql, save_analysis, list_saved_analyses, load_analysis. Profile presets supported.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
